title: Terrarian Axes
description: This mod will completely replace all axes with axes from Terraria.
body:
# ABOUT

This resource pack completely replaces all Minecraft axes with Terraria axe models.

The list of changes will be below

<details>
<summary>Item List</summary>

- Wooden axe - Copper axe
- Stone axe - Silver axe
- Copper axe - Tungsten axe
- Iron axe - Molten axe
- Golden axe - Mythril waraxe
- Diamond axe - Chlorophyte greataxe
- Netherite axe - Axe of regrowth
  




</details>


Immerse yourself in the vibe of Terraria right in Minecraft!
